    CDP Sql Stream Builder Iceberg Demo

    less than 1 minute read

    Updated: October 05, 2023

    CDP 7.1.9 came out recently alongside CSA 1.11. These releases brought some new features around flink and iceberg and I had the opportunity to create a sample project showing the capability.
